home.title: Sincere Bhakti — Gaudiya Vaishnavism Community
home.description: A spiritual community for devotees of Gaudiya Vaishnavism — share bhakti, inspire devotion. Post verses, realizations, and connect with the global saṅga.

HomePage.metaDescription: A sacred space for devotees of Gaudiya Vaishnavism. Share devotional realizations, kirtans, and insights with the saṅga.
HomePage.subtitle: Simple living, high thinking
HomePage.description: A sacred space for devotees of Gaudiya Vaishnavism. Share your realizations, kirtans, scriptural insights, and devotional media with the saṅga.
HomePage.cardBhaktiDesc: Post your realizations, kirtan links, and devotional insights.
HomePage.cardMediaDesc: Share images and videos from your spiritual journey.
HomePage.cardSangaDesc: Connect with fellow devotees in a respectful community.
